pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly generates this file using an ElementTree XML builder
verifier.py explicitly evaluates this file path to determine task success
setup_task.sh script explicitly plants exactly 5 bugs into the XML tree during generation

metadata_value: Block 3 and Block 4 are swapped in the Flow (incompatible before compatible instead of compatible first)
Practice block loop has nReps = 0 (no practice trials run)
Code component for response mapping uses = instead of == in if-statement (syntax/logic error)
Text component color references '$category_color' but conditions column is named 'stim_color'
Data filename in Settings uses 'participant' variable without the $ prefix (logs as literal string)

privileged_info_summary: The IAT experiment broken file is synthetically generated at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/iat_broken.psyexp. Code analysis confirms it contains exactly 5 planted bugs: swapped block 3 and 4 order, nReps=0 in practice block, a syntax error using '=' instead of '==' in a code component, incorrect variable reference for color ($category_color instead of $stim_color), and a missing '$' for the participant variable in the data filename. Additionally, a debrief routine is missing and must be added. The agent is expected to save the fixed file to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/iat_fixed.psyexp.
